description: Datalog validation baselines for the LUBM univ1 fixture.
note: After loading univ1.ttl WITHOUT explicit supertype assertions (i.e. each entity typed only with its most specific class), running pg_ripple.load_rules_builtin('owl-rl') + pg_ripple.infer('owl-rl') must produce inferred triples that yield the same Q1-Q14 counts as the fully-typed fixture.

inferred_triple_counts.note: Lower bounds on key entailments after OWL RL materialization from implicit-type-only data. Exact counts depend on implementation; these are minimums.

materialization_perf.note: Materialization of OWL RL rules against univ1 fixture must complete in < 5 seconds.
